text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: imp

Log:
  Drop EFI_STAGING_SIZE back down to 64M

  vmware can't cope with anything larger than 64MB. Drop this back to
  64MB everywhere but arm.

  PR: 251866
  MFC After: 1 week
